---
title: "ISL slide decks"
format:
  html: default
---

This section is a **placeholder** for Quarto-revealjs slide decks that
mirror the official PDF slide decks at
[statlearning.com → resources for Python](https://www.statlearning.com/resources-python).
The plan is one Quarto deck per ISL chapter with each code example shown
side-by-side in Python and R via Quarto `panel-tabset` blocks.

**No deck content has been authored yet.** The official slides are
copyrighted by their authors (James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani), so
the slide *text and figures* will not be reproduced here. Each chapter
deck in this section will be either:

- a **course-companion** that links to the official PDF for a given
  chapter and adds only original framing, exercises, and the Python/R
  tabset code listings authored by us, or
- (with explicit permission from the authors / with content the user
  authors themselves) a fuller deck.

That decision is pending — see the PR description / discussion for
prior-art research and the open IP question.

## Template

See [template.qmd](template.qmd) for the Python/R tabset pattern and
revealjs front matter the chapter decks will follow.
